LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DOMINO DATA LAB, INC. AND CHRISTOPHER YANG'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. DEFENDANTS DOMINO DATA LAB, INC. AND CHRIS YANG'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART ON THE TERMS SET FORTH IN THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,500. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM JOHN-PAUL DEOL'S REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION IS TO BE ATTACHED TO THE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHUMAN: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Vacated

Motion And Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoenas Or In The Alternative To Limit Their Scope_Together With Motions For Sanctions And Costs
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: The Court's tentative ruling was Appearance required. No appearances at the hearing. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF YANJING YIN'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas Or In The Alternative To Limit Their Scope Together With Motions For Sanctions And Costs.

No Appearances. Denied without Prejudice. The Court will prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Discovery Matter
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances Via ZOOM
Frank Pray, Esq., Employment Law Office of Frank Pray, 949-251-1006, fpray@employee-rights-atty.com, Attorney for Plaintiff Yanjing Yin
Allison J. Fernandez, OGLETREE, DEAKINS, NASH, SMOAK & STEWART, P.C., 415-442-4810, allison.fernandez@ogletree.com, Attorneys for Defendants DOMINO DATA LAB, INC. and CHRIS YANG

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS DOMINO DATA LAB, INC. and CHRISTOPHER YANG'S Motion For Protective Order.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted in its entirety. The Court finds that the discovery sought by Plaintiff is unreasonably-indeed, grossly-cumulative and duplicative and unduly burdensome, and that Plaintiff has not met her burden to justify the extraordinary number of discovery requests propounded. Defendants Domino Data Lab, Inc. and Chris Yang's motion for a protective order is granted in part on the terms set forth in the report and recommendation. Plaintiff's counsel shall pay monetary sanctions to Defendants in the amount of $4,500.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling in compliance with CRC3.1312. Judge Pro Tem John-Paul Deol's report and recommendation is to be attached to the proposed order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schuman: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Discovery Matter
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Continued To Dec-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Frank Pray, Esq. (949.251.1006; fpray@employee-rights-atty.com) of Employment Law Office for and with Plaintiff.
Allison Fernandez, Esq. (415.442.4810; allison.fernandez@ogletree.com) of Ogletree, Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Steward, PC for Defendants.

Counsel for Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DOMINO DATA LAB, INC. and CHRISTOPHER YANG's Motion For Protective Order:

The matter is continued to December 22, 2022 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Jennifer Roux, CSR #11033 (707.477.9599; jenroux@gmail.com). =(302/JPT)
